description: Unified install/configure/enable surface 供 three MCP component kinds (mcp-伺服器 / managed-app / mcp-app) inside webapp 管理 面板. Catalog endpoint /api/v2/mcp/market fans out across MCP.伺服器apps + ManagedAppRegistry.清單 + McpAppStore.清單apps. Persisted 在 managed-apps.js在 plus two-tier mcp-apps.js在. 已交付 (live 作為 的 2026-05-04).

activities.title: 清單 Available Apps
activities.description: GET /api/v2/mcp/market (server/routes/mcp.ts L29-L116) 平行-fans out three sources 與 normalizes each 項目 到 MarketApp shape. Reads gauth.js在 so OAuth-expired apps surface needs驗證.

activities.title: Fetch MCP 伺服器 Apps
activities.description: MCP.serverApps() (mcp/index.ts L811) 返回 伺服器app shape (L803) 供 stdio/HTTP 伺服器 declared 在 mcp.js在.

activities.title: Fetch Managed Apps
activities.description: ManagedAppRegistry.list() reads ~/.config/opencode/managed-apps.js在. BUILTIN CATALOG (mcp/app-registry.ts:272) 是 currently empty; 機制 在 standby.

activities.title: Fetch Store Apps
activities.description: McpAppStore.listApps().catch(()=>[]) merges /etc/opencode/mcp-apps.js在 (system, sudo opencode-app-install) 使用 ~/.config/opencode/mcp-apps.js在 (使用者). System wins 在 id collision.

activities.title: Normalize 與 Decorate
activities.description: Each 項目 mapped 到 MarketApp (kind, name, description, icon, 狀態, tools, 已啟用, optional 驗證+錯誤). gauth.js在 consulted 到 attach needs驗證 / 'OAuth token expired' instead 的 靜默 failure.

activities.title: Install App 由 Kind
activities.description: Kind-dependent install branch: mcp-伺服器 uses POST /:id/connect; managed-app uses POST /apps/:appId/install; mcp-app uses POST /store/apps (GitHub URL 或 local 路徑) optionally preceded 由 POST /store/apps/preview dry-執行.

activities.title: Connect MCP 伺服器
activities.description: POST /:id/connect / /disconnect 供 stdio 或 HTTP 伺服器 來自 mcp.js在.

activities.title: Install Managed App
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/install runs ManagedAppRegistry install 狀態 machine (mcp/app-registry.ts L119-L267 在 mcp.ts).

activities.title: Preview Store App
activities.description: POST /store/apps/preview reads remote/local Manifest dry-執行; rejects bad Manifest before commit.

activities.title: 註冊 Store App
activities.description: POST /store/apps 透過 McpAppStore.clone與註冊 (GitHub URL) 或 addApp (local 路徑). Persists 到 ~/.config/opencode/mcp-apps.js在.

arrows.label: GitHub URL 或 local 路徑

activities.title: Configure App Settings
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/設定 (managed) 與 /store/apps/:id/設定 (store, secrets). Settings 對話框 renders dynamic fields 來自 settingsschema returned 由 catalog endpoint.

activities.title: Authorize App OAuth
activities.description: GET /api/v2/mcp/apps/:appId/oauth/connect opens 600x700 popup; callback persists token, emits managedapp.updated. Token expiry surfaces 作為 needs驗證 + 'OAuth token expired'.

activities.title: Uninstall App
activities.description: POST /apps/:appId/uninstall (managed), DELETE /store/apps/:id (store), POST /:id/disconnect (mcp-伺服器). PATCH /store/apps/:id 與 POST /apps/:appId/disable provide toggle-off 路徑 before uninstall.

arrows.label: operator opens App Market 對話框 (layout.tsx:1065)
rendered card grid (CARD MIN W=260, 行動版 single-col <767px)
就緒 / connected 狀態 pill
